## What this changes

A short description of the change and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` is green (ruff, mypy, pytest)
- [ ] New behavior ships with tests, and tests do not touch the network
- [ ] No candidate-specific data added to code or fixtures (the engine stays profile-driven)
- [ ] No em dash characters in committed content (job-posting text is exempt)
- [ ] If this adds a source, it is registered in `defaults.py` and covered by a `test_<board>.py`
- [ ] Docs updated if the profile schema, the CLI, or the MCP tools changed

## Notes for reviewers

Anything worth calling out: a design decision, a tradeoff, a known limitation.
